strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems, including open-source GIS platforms and AI-agent tooling
Strong architectural mindset with hands-on DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure experience
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) suggest seniority beyond junior/mid-level scope, raising fit concerns
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services directly tied to the target domain
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript, React, and scalable architecture, with strong evidence of ownership and technical craftsmanship, but his seniority level, lack of domain-specific experience, and limited German proficiency raise questions about alignment with the junior/mid-level and on-site requirements of the role.
